full_text:
Zhang Mi 張彌
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Mi (張彌). Sent to Gongsun Yuan to confer him the title of “King of Yan” but betrayed and executed by the recipient. Zhang Mi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhang Mi lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
